name: Company Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the noodles according to package instructions.
2. Brown the ground turkey in 3 tablespoons of butter.
3. Stir in the tomato sauce.
4. Remove from heat and add the chopped green bell pepper, cottage cheese, cream cheese, thick sour cream, and grated onion.
5. Mix well.
6. Pour into a 2-quart casserole dish.
7. Bake at 350 degrees for 30 minutes.
8. Pour melted butter over before serving.
Notes: The original recipe calls for ground beef but it's just as good with turkey (can't tell the difference). I also use fat-free sour cream and low-fat cottage cheese, and low-fat cream cheese, and it's great!
